input.task: What are the six stages of the ML/AI lifecycle, and what output does each stage produce?

3. Model Training (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Model artifacts
4. Evaluation (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Metrics and reports
5. Deployment (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: API endpoint
6. Monitoring (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Alerts and dashboards

final_answer:
The six stages of the ML/AI lifecycle are:

1. Data Collection (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Raw datasets
2. Preprocessing (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Prepared features
3. Model Training (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Model artifacts
4. Evaluation (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Metrics and reports
5. Deployment (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: API endpoint
6. Monitoring (Page 19, Chunk 18) - Output: Alerts and dashboards

(Page 91, Chunk 91) also mentions that the ML lifecycle is circular, with monitoring feeding back into data collection.
